evals.expected_output: Summary of both dev and prod environments with service status (healthy/degraded/unhealthy). Should include response times and count of healthy services.

evals.prompt: Is production healthy? Check the prod environment
evals.expected_output: Detailed report for prod only. Should list all 11 services with individual status. Quick summary line like '✅ Prod: 11/11 healthy' or similar.

evals.prompt: The dev portal feels slow. Check dev health and tell me what might be wrong
evals.expected_output: Dev environment health report with focus on slow services (response times >5s). Should provide actionable recommendations for any degraded/unhealthy services. If portal is slow, might recommend checking API, Cloudflare tunnel, or InfluxDB.
